description: Retrieves the notebook definition (format + base64-encoded parts). Use --strip-output to clear cell outputs.
notes: Despite the path being 'notebook-content.py', the payload is base64-encoded Jupyter JSON (.ipynb). Use --strip-output to remove outputs/execution_count from cells (useful for git-friendly definitions). getDefinition is LRO (may take 2-6s). Decode payload with base64 decode to get the actual content.
